message:
fix(http2): detect flow-control window overflow per RFC 7540 §6.9.1 (bd-2c9t)

WINDOW_UPDATE that would cause connection or stream send window to
exceed 2^31-1 now returns FLOW_CONTROL_ERROR instead of silently
wrapping. All 5 inline peer_window_update_connection calls replaced
with overflow-safe apply_send_conn_window_update helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
